verses.commentary: Dare you take disputes before the ungodly instead of before the Lord's people? Secular courts are inappropriate for resolving Christian conflicts.
Don't you know the Lord's people will judge the world? If you will judge the world, aren't you competent for trivial cases? Future role demands present capacity.
We will judge angels. How much more matters of this life? Believers' eschatological authority far exceeds current disputes.
For matters of this life, do you appoint judges whose way of life is scorned in the church? Using worldly courts dishonors the church's own resources.
Paul shames them. Is there no one wise enough to judge between believers? Wisdom should exist within the community.
Instead, brother goes to court against brother before unbelievers. Internal conflicts become public spectacle.
Having lawsuits at all means complete defeat. Why not rather be wronged? Why not rather be cheated? Retaliation reveals deeper spiritual failure.
Instead you yourselves cheat and do wrong, and to brothers and sisters. Christians victimize fellow believers rather than absorbing loss.
Don't you know wrongdoers won't inherit God's kingdom? Don't be deceived. Neither sexually immoral, idolaters, adulterers, nor men who have sex with men inherit.
Nor thieves, greedy, drunkards, slanderers, nor swindlers will inherit God's kingdom. Persistent unrepentant sin excludes from inheritance.
That is what some of you were. But you were washed, sanctified, justified in the Lord Jesus' name and by God's Spirit. Past does not determine future; transformation is real.
I have the right to do anything, but not everything is beneficial. I have the right, but I will not be mastered by anything. Freedom requires wisdom and self control.
Food for stomach and stomach for food, God will destroy both. But the body is not for sexual immorality but for the Lord, and the Lord for the body. Body has eternal significance.
God raised the Lord and will raise us by his power. Resurrection connects our physical bodies to Christ's destiny.
Don't you know your bodies are Christ's members? Shall I take Christ's members and unite them with a prostitute? Never! Union with Christ makes sexual sin particularly heinous.
Don't you know he who unites with a prostitute is one body with her? For it says the two will become one flesh. Sexual union creates profound connection.
Whoever is united with the Lord is one with him in spirit. Union with Christ is the believer's defining reality.
Flee sexual immorality. All other sins are outside the body, but whoever sins sexually sins against their own body. Sexual sin uniquely violates the self.
Don't you know your bodies are temples of the Holy Spirit within you, whom you received from God? You are not your own. The Spirit's indwelling makes the body sacred space.
You were bought at a price. Therefore honor God with your bodies. Redemption creates ownership, demanding stewardship of the physical.
